top_signals.title: Inchcape Shipping Services Sets Up Shop in Brunei
top_signals.summary: Inchcape Shipping Services has opened a new office in Brunei Darussalam, expanding its presence in Southeast Asia and targeting offshore, naval and logistics operations in the country.The company said the Brunei office will initially focus on offshore services…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Israel attacks Beirut in new wave of bombing
top_signals.summary: Strike on capital’s southern suburbs comes day before two countries due to hold ‘security talks’ in Washington
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: More workers are raiding their 401(k)s as average balances fall, Fidelity says
top_signals.summary: Retirement account balances sank at the start of 2026 amid market swings, according to Fidelity. At the same time, more savers tapped their accounts for cash.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: German Power Prices Swing From Zero to Nearly €400 in a Day
top_signals.summary: German power prices will swing sharply on Thursday, with electricity trading close to zero at noon before surging to nearly €400 a megawatt-hour in the evening as solar generation fades.

top_signals.title: The Turnover: City AM’s sport business newsletter
top_signals.summary: The business of sport desk at City AM have for five months now been firing off a newsletter into the inboxes of subscribers. The Turnover takes a look at what really matters each week in the world of sport business. Who is buying what? Who owns this and that? Where is the money? The Turnover [...]
